summary: This medical record details an eye examination for patient MA Japadar, a 56-year-old male, conducted by Dr. Lalhuthangi Hmar, an Eye Specialist, on 10.12.25. Key findings include visual acuity (V_A) less than 6/18 and CPH less than 6/9. The anterior segment was noted as 'hum' and the fundus as 'we'. The diagnosis or referral indicates Presbyopia. The patient was prescribed Lubrisa Ultra eye drops to be taken three times a day (7 AM, 3 PM, 9 PM) and Cap. Memiif -G. The prescription also includes an add of +2.25 N4 and a registration of +1.00 dsph and 2.25 dsa.
